questions.question: Ek security guard ka primary role kya hai?

options.B: Property aur logon ko protect karna

questions.explanation: Security guard ka mukhya kaam property aur usmein maujood logon ki suraksha karna hai, unhe kisi bhi khatre se bachana.

questions.question: Unarmed security guard ka matlab kya hai?

options.A: Woh jiske paas koi hatiyar na ho
options.B: Woh jo uniform na pehne
options.D: Woh jo communication device use na kare

questions.explanation: Unarmed security guard woh hota hai jo apni duty par koi hathiyaar (firearm ya anya weapon) carry nahi karta.

questions.question: Ek achhe security guard ki sabse important quality kya hai?

options.B: Sharp observation skills

questions.explanation: Ek security guard ke liye sharp observation skills bahut zaroori hain taaki woh kisi bhi suspicious activity ya khatre ko pehchan sake.

questions.question: Security ka basic aim kya hai?

options.B: Loss aur damage ko prevent karna

questions.explanation: Security ka mukhya uddeshya kisi bhi tarah ke nuksaan, chori, ya hani ko rokna hai.

questions.question: Physical security mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Fencing, locks, aur CCTV

questions.explanation: Physical security mein bhautik upkaran aur system jaise ki baade (fencing), taale (locks), aur CCTV cameras shamil hote hain jo property ko surakshit rakhte hain.

questions.question: Security guard ki duty ke dauran professional behaviour kyon important hai?

options.A: Taki woh jaldi ghar ja sake
options.B: Taki woh company ki image ko maintain kar sake
options.C: Taki use koi kaam na karna pade
options.D: Taki woh logon se lad sake

questions.explanation: Professional behaviour se company ki image achhi banti hai aur logon ka security par vishwas badhta hai.

questions.question: Security guard ko apni duties ke bare mein kahan se information milti hai?

options.B: Duty post orders aur SOPs se

questions.explanation: Har security guard ko uski specific duty post ke liye detailed orders (instructions) aur Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) diye jaate hain.

questions.question: Ek security guard ko kis tarah ki information confidential rakhni chahiye?

options.B: Client ke business secrets aur security arrangements
options.C: Apne favourite movie stars ke naam

questions.explanation: Client ke business secrets aur security arrangements jaise sensitive information ko confidential rakhna security guard ki zimmedari hai.

questions.question: Security guard kis tarah se crime ko deter karta hai?

options.B: Apni visible presence se

questions.explanation: Ek security guard ki visible presence (dikhai dena) criminals ko apradh karne se rokne mein madad karti hai.

questions.question: Kisi incident ke baad, security guard ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Usse ignore karna chahiye
options.D: Apne dosto ko phone karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi incident ke baad, uski sahi aur detailed report banana bahut zaroori hai future reference aur investigation ke liye.

questions.question: Security guard training mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: First aid, communication, aur legal aspects

questions.explanation: Security guard training mein first aid, communication skills, reporting procedures, aur legal aspects jaise vishay shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Security guard ki duty kis sector mein ho sakti hai?

options.B: Only commercial buildings
options.C: Residential, commercial, industrial aur events mein

questions.explanation: Security guards alag-alag sectors jaise ki residential societies, commercial offices, industrial sites aur public events mein bhi duty karte hain.

questions.question: Kisi emergency mein, security guard ka pehla action kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Situation ko assess karna aur authorities ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Emergency mein sabse pehle situation ko samajhna aur phir relevant authorities (police, fire, medical) ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek security guard ko kitna alert rehna chahiye?

options.B: Sirf din mein

questions.explanation: Ek security guard ko apni poori duty ke dauran high alert par rehna chahiye taaki woh kisi bhi khatre ko turant pehchan sake.

questions.question: Security guard ko kaun se personal items duty par nahi le jane chahiye jo distraction cause kar sakte hain?

options.B: Mobile phone for personal use, excessive reading material

questions.explanation: Duty par personal mobile phone ka zyada istemal ya anya distraction wali cheezein guard ki alert-ness ko kam kar sakti hain, jo uski duty ke liye khatarnak hai.

questions.question: Security guard ko public relations (PR) skills ki kya zaroorat hai?

options.B: Taki woh visitors aur staff ke saath acche se interact kar sake
options.C: Taki woh apni salary badha sake
options.D: Taki woh company ke ads bana sake

questions.explanation: Achhi PR skills se security guard visitors, employees aur public ke saath polite aur effective tareeke se communicate kar paata hai.

questions.question: Ek security guard ko apni physical fitness maintain karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki woh sports mein participate kar sake
options.B: Taki woh lambe samay tak duty kar sake aur emergency situations ko handle kar sake
options.D: Taki woh gym instructor ban sake

questions.explanation: Physical fitness zaroori hai taaki security guard lambe ghanton tak duty par khada reh sake, patrolling kar sake aur emergency mein tezi se respond kar sake.

questions.question: Security guard ka uniform kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Saaf, istri kiya hua aur properly fitted

questions.explanation: Uniform saaf, istri kiya hua aur properly fitted hona chahiye taaki ek professional image bane aur guard comfortable rahe.

questions.question: Duty ke dauran security guard ko kya avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: Apni post chhodna bina permission ke

questions.explanation: Bina permission ke apni post chhodna ek serious offence hai, kyunki isse security compromise ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Visitor management mein security guard ki kya responsibility hai?

options.B: Visitors ki identity verify karna aur entry record karna

questions.explanation: Visitors ki identity verify karna, unki entry aur exit record karna, aur unhe sahi guidance dena security guard ki zimmedari hai.

questions.question: Ek security guard ko kis tarah ki language use karni chahiye?

options.B: Polite aur respectful language

questions.explanation: Polite aur respectful language ka istemal karne se accha mahol banta hai aur conflicts kam hote hain.

questions.question: Security guard ko duty par late aana kyon mana hai?

options.A: Kyunki usse traffic jam ho sakta hai
options.B: Kyunki pichhle guard ko relief nahi milegi aur security gap aa sakta hai
options.C: Kyunki usse boss gussa ho jayega
options.D: Kyunki usse uski salary cut jayegi

questions.explanation: Duty par late aane se pichhle guard ko relief nahi milti aur uski duty extend ho jaati hai, jisse security cover mein kami aa sakti hai.

questions.question: Kisi suspicious person ko dekhne par security guard ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Usse confront karna aur ladai karna chahiye
options.C: Usse observe karna aur apni report authorities ko dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Suspicious person ko observe karna, uski activities record karna aur turant apne supervisor ya authorities ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Security guard ko public ke saath deal karte waqt kaun sa approach rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Friendly aur helpful, but firm when needed

questions.explanation: Friendly aur helpful approach se log comfortable feel karte hain, lekin zaroorat padne par firm rehna bhi zaroori hai security maintain karne ke liye.

questions.question: Ek security guard ka kaam sirf physical presence tak seemit hai ya usmein aur bhi zimmedariyan shamil hain?

options.B: Patrolling, reporting, access control, emergency response bhi shamil hai

questions.explanation: Security guard ki zimmedariyan physical presence se kahin zyada hoti hain, jaise patrolling, incident reporting, access control aur emergency response.

questions.question: Apni duty ke dauran, ek security guard ko kis tarah ki cheezon se door rehna chahiye?

options.B: Drugs aur alcohol se

questions.explanation: Drugs aur alcohol duty par bilkul allowed nahi hain, kyunki yeh judgement aur responsiveness ko negatively affect karte hain.

questions.question: Duty handover ke time kya karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Sabhi important incidents aur pending tasks ki jaankari dena

questions.explanation: Duty handover ke waqt sabhi zaroori jaankari, incidents, aur pending tasks ko clearly communicate karna chahiye taaki continuity bani rahe.

questions.question: Agar kisi visitor ko site par entrance deny kiya jaata hai, toh security guard ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Usse zabardasti bahar nikal dena chahiye
options.B: Usse reason batana chahiye polite tareeke se aur uske doubts clear karne chahiye

questions.explanation: Politely reason explain karna aur unke concerns ko address karna professional behaviour hai, jabki force ya ignorance avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Security guard ko apni company ki policies aur procedures ki jaankari hona kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Taki woh apni duties ko sahi tareeke se nibha sake aur company ke standards maintain kar sake
options.C: Taki woh doosron ko gyaan de sake
options.D: Taki woh unhe yaad kar sake

questions.explanation: Company policies aur procedures ki jaankari hone se guard apni duties ko sahi dhang se perform kar paata hai aur company ke rules follow karta hai.

questions.question: Kisi bhi situation mein, security guard ko apni emotions par control kyon rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Taki woh professional judgement le sake aur situation ko bigadne na de

questions.explanation: Emotions par control rakhne se guard stressful situations mein bhi calm reh kar sahi decision le paata hai aur situation ko escalate hone se rokta hai.

questions.question: Security guard ki integrity (imaanadari) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Har situation mein honest, ethical aur trustworthy rehna

questions.explanation: Integrity ka matlab hai har haalat mein imaanadar, naitik aur bharosemand rehna, jo security profession ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar koi senior officer site par visit karta hai, toh security guard ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Usse ignore karna chahiye
options.C: Usse polite tareeke se greet karna aur uski identity verify karna chahiye (agar zaroori ho)

questions.explanation: Senior officers ko polite greet karna aur security protocols ke mutabik unki identity verify karna professional behaviour hai.

questions.question: Security guard ko shift ke dauran apne personal belongings (jaise bags) kahan rakhne chahiye?

options.A: Duty post par jahan sab dekh sakein
options.B: Designated locker ya secure area mein

questions.explanation: Personal belongings ko designated locker ya secure area mein rakhna chahiye taaki woh duty par distraction na banein aur unki suraksha bhi bani rahe.

questions.question: Ek security guard ko kis tarah ki information ko share karne se bachna chahiye?

options.B: Confidential client/site information to unauthorized persons

questions.explanation: Confidential client ya site information ko unauthorized persons ke saath share karna security breach hai aur company ki reputation ko nuksaan pahuncha sakta hai.

questions.question: Effective communication ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Clearly bolna aur sunne wale ki baat ko samajhna

questions.explanation: Effective communication mein sirf bolna nahi, balki apni baat ko saaf tareeke se kehna aur doosre ki baat ko dhyan se sunna aur samajhna bhi shamil hai.

questions.question: Incident report mein kaun si information shamil honi chahiye?

options.B: Date, time, location, involved parties, aur details of the incident

questions.explanation: Incident report mein date, time, location, shamil log aur incident ka poora vivaran shamil hona chahiye taaki woh accurate aur complete ho.

questions.question: Walkie-talkie par baat karte waqt kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Short, clear aur concise messages dena

questions.explanation: Walkie-talkie par messages short, clear aur concise hone chahiye taaki communication fast aur effective ho.

questions.question: Agar koi aapko call par emergency batata hai, toh aapka pehla step kya hoga?

options.B: Information verify karna aur relevant authorities ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Emergency call par information verify karna aur turant relevant authorities (police, fire, ambulance) ko inform karna sabse zaroori hai.

questions.question: Log book (register) maintain karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Sabhi daily activities, incidents aur visitor entries ka record rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Log book mein sabhi daily activities, incidents aur visitor entries ka record rakhna future reference aur audit ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Handover report mein kya information shamil honi chahiye?

options.B: Pending tasks, key issues, aur special instructions

questions.explanation: Handover report mein pending tasks, koi bhi important issues, aur special instructions shamil hone chahiye taaki next shift guard ko poori jaankari ho.

questions.question: Non-verbal communication mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Body language, facial expressions aur gestures

questions.explanation: Non-verbal communication mein body language, chehre ke haav-bhaav (facial expressions) aur ishaare (gestures) shamil hote hain jo bina bole bahut kuch keh jaate hain.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi visitor aggressive ho kar baat kare, toh aapka response kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Calm raho, uski baat suno aur situation ko diffuse karne ki koshish karo

questions.explanation: Aggressive visitor ke saath calm rehna aur uski baat sunna situation ko shaant karne mein madad karta hai. Confrontation se bachna chahiye.

questions.question: Radio communication mein 'Roger' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Message received aur understood

questions.explanation: Radio communication mein 'Roger' ka matlab hai ki message mil gaya hai aur samajh mein aa gaya hai.

questions.question: Ek security guard ko apni reporting skills ko kaise improve karna chahiye?

options.B: Regularly practice karke aur details par dhyan de kar
options.D: Doosron ki reports copy kar ke

questions.explanation: Reporting skills ko improve karne ke liye regular practice aur details par dhyan dena zaroori hai taaki reports accurate aur complete hon.

questions.question: Incident report mein facts aur opinions mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Facts woh hain jo hue, opinions woh hain jo aapko lagta hai
options.D: Facts sirf important logon ke liye hain

questions.explanation: Facts woh hain jo asal mein hue the, jinhe prove kiya ja sakta hai, jabki opinions aapki vyaktigat soch ya anumaan hain. Reports mein sirf facts likhne chahiye.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi unknown person site ke blueprints maange, toh aapka response kya hoga?

options.B: Usse politely deny kar denge aur apne supervisor ko inform karenge

questions.explanation: Site blueprints confidential information hoti hai. Unauthorized person ko deny karna aur supervisor ko inform karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Security guard ko communication barriers ko kaise overcome karna chahiye?

options.B: Clear aur simple language use karke, aur active listening practice karke

questions.explanation: Clear aur simple language ka istemal aur active listening se communication barriers ko kam kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Internal communication mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Supervisor, co-workers aur site management se communication

questions.explanation: Internal communication mein team ke andar, jaise supervisor, co-workers aur site management ke saath baat-cheet shamil hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek achhi written report ki kya khas baat hai?

options.B: Clear, concise, accurate aur factual ho

questions.explanation: Achhi written report clear, concise, accurate aur factual hoti hai taaki usse aasani se samjha ja sake aur uska sahi istemal ho sake.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi information Hindi mein chahiye lekin aapko English mein reply karna hai, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Jitna ho sake Hindi mein hi reply karenge, ya supervisor se help lenge

questions.explanation: Jitna ho sake, common language mein reply karein, aur agar communication gap ho toh supervisor ki madad lein taaki information sahi se convey ho.

questions.question: Security guard ko kis tarah ki information ko record karna chahiye jo future mein investigation ke liye helpful ho?

options.B: Vehicle numbers, suspicious activities, witness statements, time of events

questions.explanation: Vehicle numbers, suspicious activities, gawahon ke bayan, aur events ke samay jaisi details future investigation ke liye bahut important hoti hain.

questions.question: Patrolling ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Area ko observe karna, threats ko detect karna aur crime ko deter karna

questions.explanation: Patrolling ka mukhya uddeshya area ki nigrani karna, kisi bhi khatre ko pehchanna aur apradh ko rokna hai.

questions.question: Foot patrolling ke kya fayde hain?

options.B: Silent movement aur hidden areas tak access

questions.explanation: Foot patrolling se guard chupchap move kar paata hai aur un jagahon tak bhi pahunch paata hai jahan gaadi nahi ja sakti.

questions.question: Access control ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Kisi ko bhi andar aane dena
options.B: Sirf authorized logon ko hi property mein entry dena

questions.explanation: Access control ka matlab hai yeh ensure karna ki sirf authorized log hi kisi property ya area mein enter kar sakein.

questions.question: Visitor pass kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Visitors ki identity aur entry time ko track karne ke liye
options.C: Visitors ko confuse karne ke liye
options.D: Visitors ko gift dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Visitor pass se visitors ki pehchan aur unke entry-exit time ko track kiya ja sakta hai, jo security ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Suspicious package ko dekhne par kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Usse touch na karna, area ko cordon off karna aur authorities ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Suspicious package ko touch nahi karna chahiye. Turant area ko gher lena (cordon off) aur police ya bomb disposal squad ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Patrolling karte waqt kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Irregular routes lena, corners aur shadows par dhyan dena

questions.explanation: Irregular patrolling routes se criminals ko aapke pattern ka pata nahi chalta. Corners aur shadows jaise chhupi jagahon par dhyan dena zaroori hai.

questions.question: CCTV monitoring ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Large areas ki continuous surveillance aur incident recording

questions.explanation: CCTV se bade areas ki lagatar nigrani hoti hai aur incidents record ho jaate hain jo baad mein evidence ke roop mein kaam aa sakte hain.

questions.question: Gate pass system kyon use hota hai?

options.B: Material aur equipment ki movement ko regulate aur track karne ke liye
options.C: Entry ko slow karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Gate pass system se material aur equipment ki site se bahar ya andar ki movement ko control aur track kiya ja sakta hai taaki chori roki ja sake.

questions.question: Crowd control mein security guard ka kya role hai?

options.B: Crowd ko manage karna, safe passage provide karna aur panic rokna

questions.explanation: Crowd control mein guard ka kaam bheed ko vyavasthit karna, logon ko surakshit raasta dena aur kisi bhi tarah ki ghabrahat ko rokna hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi broken window ya damaged property dikhe, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Usse theek karne ki koshish karenge
options.C: Apne supervisor ko turant report karenge aur area ko secure karenge
options.D: Uski photo kheench kar social media par daal denge

questions.explanation: Broken window ya damaged property ko turant report karna chahiye aur us area ko secure karna chahiye taaki koi aur nuksaan na ho ya koi andar na aa sake.

questions.question: Vehicle patrolling ke kya fayde hain?

options.B: Bade area ko jaldi cover karna aur rapid response

questions.explanation: Vehicle patrolling se bade area ko jaldi cover kiya ja sakta hai aur emergency mein rapid response diya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Key management system kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Keys ki accountability aur security maintain karne ke liye
options.D: Keys ko distribute karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Key management system se yeh ensure hota hai ki keys sirf authorized logon ke paas hon aur unki movement track ho, jisse security badhti hai.

questions.question: Observation skills ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Details par dhyan dena, patterns pehchanna aur unusual activities ko notice karna

questions.explanation: Observation skills ka matlab hai sirf dekhna nahi, balki details par dhyan dena, patterns ko samajhna aur kisi bhi unusual activity ko turant notice karna.

questions.question: Agar aapko kisi ki identity par doubt ho, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Usse rok kar further verification ke liye bolenge

questions.explanation: Agar identity par doubt ho, toh usse rok kar additional verification (jaise ID card check, call to concerned person) karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Perimeter security mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Boundary walls, fencing, gates aur external lighting

questions.explanation: Perimeter security mein property ki baahari seema ki suraksha shamil hoti hai, jaise boundary walls, fencing, gates aur baahari roshni.

questions.question: Patrolling ke dauran, light fittings ya electrical points mein koi spark ya smoke dikhe toh kya action lena chahiye?

options.B: Turant power off karna (agar safe ho), fire department ko inform karna aur area evacuate karna
options.C: Usse theek karne ki koshish karna

questions.explanation: Electrical fault ya aag ke signs par turant action lena chahiye: power off, fire department ko inform, aur area ko khali karna.

questions.question: Security guard ko parking area mein kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Unauthorized parking, suspicious vehicles aur traffic flow ko monitor karna

questions.explanation: Parking area mein unauthorized parking, suspicious vehicles aur traffic flow ko monitor karna zaroori hai taaki koi security threat na ho.

questions.question: Aag lagne par sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Alarm bajana aur fire department ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Aag lagne par turant alarm bajana aur fire department ko inform karna sabse pehla aur zaroori step hai.

questions.question: Fire extinguisher ko use karne ka sahi tareeka kya hai?

options.B: PASS method (Pull, Aim, Squeeze, Sweep) follow karna
options.D: Usse paani ki tarah use karna

questions.explanation: Fire extinguisher ko use karne ka sahi tareeka PASS method hai: Pin pull karna, aag ki base par aim karna, handle squeeze karna aur side-to-side sweep karna.

questions.question: Evacuation plan ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Emergency mein logon ko surakshit tareeke se bahar nikalna

questions.explanation: Evacuation plan ka uddeshya emergency mein sabhi logon ko building se surakshit aur vyavasthit tareeke se bahar nikalna hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi ko heart attack aaye, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant medical emergency (ambulance) ko call karna aur first aid dena (agar trained ho)

questions.explanation: Heart attack ek serious emergency hai. Turant ambulance bulana aur basic life support (CPR) dena (agar trained ho) zaroori hai.

questions.question: First aid box mein kya-kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Bandages, antiseptic, pain killers aur gloves

questions.explanation: First aid box mein zaroori cheezein jaise bandages, antiseptic solution, pain killers aur gloves honi chahiye chhot-mot choton ke liye.

questions.question: Bomb threat ki information milne par kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant supervisor aur police ko inform karna, aur evacuation ke liye taiyar rehna

questions.explanation: Bomb threat ko hamesha serious lena chahiye. Turant supervisor aur police ko inform karna aur evacuation procedures follow karna chahiye.

questions.question: Natural disaster (jaise earthquake) ke dauran security guard ka kya role hai?

options.B: Logo ko safe areas mein guide karna, panic rokna aur authorities ki madad karna

questions.explanation: Natural disaster mein security guard ko logon ko surakshit jagahon par guide karna, ghabrahat ko rokna aur rescue authorities ki madad karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar kisi ko chot lage aur khoon beh raha ho, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Direct pressure apply karna saaf kapde se aur medical help bulana

questions.explanation: Khoon behne par direct pressure apply karna bleeding ko rokne mein madad karta hai. Turant medical help bulana bhi zaroori hai.

questions.question: Fire extinguisher kitne types ke hote hain?

options.B: A, B, C, D aur K types

questions.explanation: Fire extinguishers alag-alag tarah ki aag ke liye hote hain, jaise Class A (ordinary combustibles), B (flammable liquids), C (electrical), D (metals) aur K (cooking oils).

questions.question: Crowd evacuation ke dauran kya priority honi chahiye?

options.B: Sabhi logon ki safety aur order maintain karna
options.D: Kisi ko bhi help na karna

questions.explanation: Crowd evacuation mein sabse pehli priority sabhi logon ki suraksha aur vyavastha banaye rakhna hai taaki koi injury na ho.

questions.question: CPR (Cardiopulmonary Resuscitation) kis situation mein diya jaata hai?

options.B: Jab koi saans na le raha ho aur uska dil kaam na kar raha ho
options.C: Sirf jab koi so raha ho
options.D: Jab kisi ko bhookh lagi ho

questions.explanation: CPR tab diya jaata hai jab kisi ki saans ruk jaye aur uska dil kaam karna band kar de, taaki uski jaan bachai ja sake.

questions.question: Electrical fire ko bujhane ke liye kaun sa extinguisher use karna chahiye?

options.B: Foam extinguisher
options.C: CO2 (Carbon Dioxide) ya Dry Chemical (ABC) extinguisher

questions.explanation: Electrical fire (Class C) ke liye CO2 ya Dry Chemical (ABC) extinguisher use kiya jaata hai, kyunki paani electrical fires ko aur badha sakta hai ya shock de sakta hai.

questions.question: Aggressive ya violent person ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.B: Calm rehna, backup bulana aur situation ko diffuse karne ki koshish karna, avoid direct confrontation

questions.explanation: Aggressive person ke saath calm rehna aur direct confrontation se bachna chahiye. Hamesha backup bulana aur situation ko shaant karne ki koshish karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar kisi ko jalne ki chot lage (burns), toh pehla first aid kya hoga?

options.B: Thande, behte paani se jalne wale hisse ko thanda karna

questions.explanation: Jalne ki chot par turant thanda, behta paani dalna dard ko kam karta hai aur jalne ke effect ko rokta hai.

questions.question: Emergency exits ko clear kyon rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Emergency mein logon ko tezi se bahar nikalne ke liye

questions.explanation: Emergency exits ko hamesha clear rakhna chahiye taaki kisi bhi emergency mein log bina kisi rukawat ke bahar nikal sakein.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi chemical spill dikhe, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Area ko isolate karna, hazard sign lagana aur trained personnel ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Chemical spills dangerous ho sakte hain. Area ko isolate karna, logon ko door rakhna aur trained personnel ya hazmat team ko inform karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek unarmed security guard ko 'citizen's arrest' karne ka adhikar kab hota hai?

options.B: Jab koi 'cognizable offence' uski presence mein ho raha ho
options.C: Jab woh kisi ko pasand na kare
options.D: Jab woh kisi ko challenge karna chahe

questions.explanation: Citizen's arrest ka adhikar tab hota hai jab koi vyakti aapki maujoodgi mein koi sangheen apradh (cognizable offence) kar raha ho.

questions.question: Use of force (bal ka prayog) ke baare mein security guard ko kya principle follow karna chahiye?

options.A: Zyada se zyada bal ka prayog
options.B: Minimal force (kam se kam bal) jo situation ko control karne ke liye zaroori ho
options.C: Sirf tab jab koi ladai kare
options.D: Kabhi bhi bal ka prayog na kare

questions.explanation: Security guard ko hamesha 'minimal force' ka principle follow karna chahiye, matlab utna hi bal prayog karein jitna situation ko control karne ke liye zaroori ho.

questions.question: Confidentiality ka kya matlab hai security profession mein?

options.B: Sensitive information ko unauthorized logon se chhupana

questions.explanation: Confidentiality ka matlab hai ki aapko mili hui sensitive information ko unauthorized logon ke saath share nahi karna.

questions.question: Agar koi security guard illegal activity mein shamil ho, toh uske kya parinaam ho sakte hain?

options.B: Termination, legal action aur license cancellation

questions.explanation: Illegal activity mein shamil hone par security guard ko naukri se nikala ja sakta hai, uske khilaf kanooni kaarwai ho sakti hai aur uska license bhi cancel ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Security guard ko 'data protection' laws ki basic jaankari kyon honi chahiye?

options.B: Taki woh personal data ko sahi tareeke se handle kar sake aur privacy maintain kar sake
options.C: Taki woh data delete kar sake

questions.explanation: Data protection laws ki jaankari hone se guard personal data ko sahi tareeke se handle kar paata hai aur logon ki privacy ka ullanghan nahi karta.

questions.question: Duty ke dauran CCTV footage ko access karne ke liye kya procedure follow karna chahiye?

options.A: Jab man kare access kar lo
options.B: Authorized permission aur proper documentation ke saath hi access karna
options.C: Kisi ko bhi footage dikha do

questions.explanation: CCTV footage sensitive hota hai. Usse access karne ke liye authorized permission aur proper documentation zaroori hai taaki misuse na ho.

questions.question: Ethical dilemma kya hota hai?

options.B: Jab aapko do moral options mein se ek chunna ho

questions.explanation: Ethical dilemma tab hota hai jab aapke saamne do aise options hon jo dono hi moral ya sahi lagte hon, aur aapko unmein se ek chunna ho.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi bribe offer kare, toh aapka response kya hoga?

options.B: Politely deny karenge aur apne supervisor ko inform karenge

questions.explanation: Bribe offer ko hamesha politely deny karna chahiye aur turant apne supervisor ko inform karna chahiye. Yeh ethical behaviour hai.

questions.question: Security guard ko 'false arrest' (galat girftari) se kyon bachna chahiye?

options.B: Kyunki isse legal action, fines aur badnaam hone ka khatra hota hai
options.D: Kyunki usmein paperwork zyada hota hai

questions.explanation: False arrest se security guard par kanooni kaarwai, bhari jurmana aur uski reputation ko nuksaan ho sakta hai, isliye isse bachna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Professionalism ka kya matlab hai security guard ke liye?

options.B: Apni duties ko imaanadari, zimmedari aur acche vyavahar ke saath nibhana

questions.explanation: Professionalism ka matlab hai apni duties ko imaanadari, zimmedari, aur uchit vyavahar ke saath perform karna, jismein acchi image aur integrity shamil hai.

questions.question: Legal liability ka kya matlab hai security guard ke context mein?

options.B: Kanooni roop se zimmedar hona apne actions aur negligence ke liye

questions.explanation: Legal liability ka matlab hai ki security guard apne actions ya negligence ke liye kanooni roop se zimmedar ho sakta hai, jaise false arrest ya excessive force.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi aisa order mile jo aapko illegal ya unethical lage, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Apne supervisor se clarification maangna aur agar zaroori ho toh senior management ko report karna

questions.explanation: Illegal ya unethical order ko follow nahi karna chahiye. Turant clarification maangna aur agar zaroori ho toh senior management ko report karna sahi step hai.

questions.question: Security guard ko self-defense techniques kyon sikhayi jaati hain?

options.B: Apni aur doosron ki suraksha ke liye, jab koi aur option na ho
options.C: Fighting competition mein participate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Self-defense techniques apni aur doosron ki suraksha ke liye sikhayi jaati hain, jab koi aur option na bacha ho aur jaan ka khatra ho.

questions.question: Code of Conduct ka kya mahatva hai security guard ke liye?

options.B: Yeh professional behaviour, ethics aur standards ko define karta hai

questions.explanation: Code of Conduct security guard ke professional behaviour, ethics aur standards ko define karta hai, jisse woh sahi tareeke se duty kar sake.

questions.question: Agar koi minor (naabaaligh) apradh karte hue pakda jaye, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Usse rokna, apne supervisor ko inform karna aur police ko bulana, minor ke rights ka dhyan rakhna

questions.explanation: Minor ke case mein, usse rokna, supervisor aur police ko inform karna zaroori hai, lekin minor ke kanooni adhikaron ka bhi dhyan rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Security guard ko sabhi laws aur regulations ki jaankari kyon honi chahiye jo uski duties se related hain?

options.B: Taki woh apni duties ko legally aur ethically perform kar sake aur legal problems se bach sake
options.C: Taki woh doosron ko gyaan de sake
options.D: Taki woh exams pass kar sake

questions.explanation: Laws aur regulations ki jaankari hone se security guard apni duties ko kanooni aur naitik roop se perform kar paata hai aur kanooni musibaton se bach paata hai.
